name: ai-project-portfolio
description: Portfolio repository for AI-assisted applications, product demos, and prompt workflows.

scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace apps/astra && npm run build --workspace apps/nexus-play && npm run build --workspace apps/layerforge-studio && npm run build --workspace apps/opspilot-ai-operations-toolkit && npm run build --workspace apps/redactready-local && npm run build --workspace apps/scamshield-ai && npm run build --workspace apps/focusforge
scripts.lint:apps: npm run lint --workspace apps/astra && npm run lint --workspace apps/nexus-play && npm run lint --workspace apps/layerforge-studio && npm run lint --workspace apps/opspilot-ai-operations-toolkit && npm run lint --workspace apps/redactready-local && npm run lint --workspace apps/scamshield-ai && npm run lint --workspace apps/focusforge
scripts.test:all: npm run test --workspace apps/redactready-local && npm run test --workspace apps/scamshield-ai -- --run && npm run test:run --workspace apps/focusforge
scripts.verify: npm run lint:apps && npm run typecheck:all && npm run test:all && npm run build:all
